consumed_ticket_requirements: economic_envelope.provider_candidate must be present and known
economic_envelope.budget_class must be present and known
economic_envelope.max_tokens_allowed must be a positive int
requested_execution_plan_requirements: provider_candidate must be present and known
budget_class must be present and known
max_tokens_requested must be a positive int
real automatic execution requires history off policy
real automatic execution requires explicit non-negative retry cap
real automatic execution requires explicit non-negative tool-call cap
real automatic execution requires fallback provider explicitly disabled
token_cap_enforcement: requested max_tokens_requested must be positive int
requested max_tokens_requested must be <= consumed max_tokens_allowed
dry_run_enforcement: execution_mode dry_run with dry_run false fails closed
execution_mode execute_after_confirm with dry_run true is diagnostic dry-run only
diagnostic dry-run pass does not imply provider or network permission
dry-run-only requests may pass if other policy checks stay within the consumed envelope
allowed_execution_mode_enforcement: execute_after_confirm is required for real automatic execution
answer_only, propose_only, dry_run, and blocked fail real automatic execution
history_policy: real automatic execution requires history_mode off or equivalent history_allowed false
missing or non-off history policy fails closed
retry_policy: real automatic execution requires explicit non-negative max_retries_allowed
tool_call_policy: real automatic execution requires explicit non-negative max_tool_calls_allowed
fallback_provider_policy: real automatic execution requires fallback_provider_allowed false
missing or true fallback provider policy fails closed
route_tier_non_authority_proof: route_tier cannot rescue missing or unknown provider, budget, or token authority
purity_no_mutation_proof: helper returns status and violations only
provider_network_absence: No provider execution, network execution, SDK/API imports, or provider registry were added.
env_secrets_absence: No .env reads, os.environ reads, API keys, or real secret loading were added.
e3_inertness: No production caller for evaluate_external_budget_gate was added.
db_server_workflow_absence: No DB, server, workflow, router runtime automatic call path, or provider execution wiring was added.
checks_run: git diff --check -> CRLF warning only, no whitespace/content failure
rg -n "^import requests|^from requests|^import httpx|^from httpx|openai|anthropic|gemini" scripts -> existing pre-E4 regex/text references only
rg -n "\.env|os\.environ|dotenv|API_KEY|SECRET|TOKEN" scripts tests reports/E4-A7-PRE-ECONOMIC-EXECUTION-POLICY-BOUNDARY -> report assertions plus existing probe/test/reference matches only
rg -n "datetime\.now|time\.time|utcnow\(" scripts tests -> existing pre-E4 probe timestamp generation plus A4/A5/A6/A7 negative test assertions only

grep_matches_classified.command: rg -n "^import requests|^from requests|^import httpx|^from httpx|openai|anthropic|gemini" scripts

grep_matches_classified.classification: report assertions plus existing probe/test/reference matches only
existing pre-E4 probe timestamp generation plus A4/A5/A6/A7 negative test assertions only

known_limitations: A7-PRE does not read real secrets.
A7-PRE does not implement provider registry.
A7-PRE does not implement token benchmark.
A7-PRE does not wire runtime automatic call path.
A7-PRE uses abstract provider and budget classes only.
